comment:
Robin iBolt™: Note: The iBolt cannot be programmed in the Stage mode and then used in the Sky mode and vice versa!
iBOLT™
The time has come to replace your antiquated discharge sourced outdoor aerial effect luminaires with a new generation Searchlight and Skyflower fixture, to make outdoor lighting statements like never before!
